import pandas as pd


def join_orders_with_customers(orders, customers):
    result = pd.merge(orders, customers, on="customer_id", validate="many_to_one")
    return result


def combine_datasets(left, right):
    merged = pd.merge(left, right, left_on="user_id", right_on="id", validate="one_to_one")
    return merged


def enrich_with_prices(products, prices):
    return pd.merge(products, prices, on="sku", validate="many_to_one")
